Reviewer independently re-ran the project verification (go build -o build/bin/certify ./cmd/certify/ && go test ./... -count=1): GREEN

- TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip() stub — plan requirement #5 unimplemented
- TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA missing plan-required Unsupported==true and no-dimension-scores assertions; only checks Grade
- TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability != 0.95 as plan mandates
- Production code (pipeline.go) modified despite plan non-goal: 'Do NOT change production code in this step — only tests'
- Substantially incomplete: only ~40% of plan objective delivered with correct assertions
- aggregate score 0.250 below threshold 0.600
